class \mbox{\hyperlink{classGaussian}{Gaussian}}

\doxysubsection{Detailed Description}
Incident field\+: paraxial \doxylink{classGaussian}{Gaussian} beam in a homogeneous medium. 

The \doxylink{classGaussian}{Gaussian} class implements a \doxylink{classGaussian}{Gaussian} beam illumination. It evaluates complex electric and magnetic fields at arbitrary points and provides RWG‑weighted integrals used in the Mo\+M/\+SIE RHS.

Notes\+:
\begin{DoxyItemize}
\item The beam is defined by wavelength, waist size $ w_0 $, a focal point, medium permittivity (via refractive index), propagation direction, and polarization vector.
\item The implementation assumes a homogeneous background (no layered Green\textquotesingle{}s functions); layered variants throw. 
\end{DoxyItemize}

Definition in file \mbox{\hyperlink{Gaussian_8h_source}{Gaussian.\+h}}.
